item.title: OpenAI机器人部门负责人因公司与五角大楼合作协议辞职
item.description: OpenAI机器人团队负责人周六宣布辞职，称公司与五角大楼达成协议，将在其机密网络内部署人工智能模型，此举是其辞职的原因。【原文：The head of OpenAI’s robotics team resigned Saturday, citing the company’s deal to deploy its artificial intelligence models within the Pentagon’s classified network as the cause.】

item.title: 特朗普称需有充分理由才能向伊朗派遣地面部队
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普在空军一号上与记者会面时表示，美国向伊朗派遣地面部队必须有"非常充分的理由"。【原文：There would have to be a “very good reason” for the US to deploy ground troops to Iran, President Donald Trump says in a meeting with the press on Air Force One.】

item.title: 美国通胀指标在伊朗战争前可能已出现分歧
item.description: 在2月份就业报告令人失望、挑战了劳动力市场趋于稳定的预期之后，本周将公布两份通胀报告，其中包括美联储偏好的价格指标。【原文：A pair of inflation reports, including the Federal Reserve’s preferred price gauge, surface in the coming week after a dismal February jobs report that challenged perceptions the labor market is stabilizing.】

item.title: 交易员抢购衍生品，风险加剧：《信贷周刊》
item.description: 伊朗战争。美国就业市场持续疲软。人工智能与整个行业的潜在消亡。私人信贷压力日益增大。【原文：War in Iran. A weakening US jobs market. Artificial intelligence and the potential demise of whole industries. Growing pressure on private credit.】

item.title: Polymarket创始人称战争押注正面临日益增长的抵制
item.description: Polymarket创始人兼首席执行官谢恩·科普兰表示，预测市场行业与战争相关的合约正面临日益增长的风险，并承认日益提升的知名度带来"更多资金，更多问题"——这位行业领军人物直言不讳地承认，其旗舰产品正面临沦为政治负担的风险。【原文：Polymarket founder and CEO Shayne Coplan said the prediction market industry’s war-related contracts face growing risks and acknowledged that rising visibility brings “more money, more problems” — a blunt concession from one of the sector’s most prominent figures that its flagship product threatens to become a political liability.】

item.title: 据称，AtaiBeckley正在探索其主要迷幻药物的多种方案
item.description: 据知情人士透露，AtaiBeckley公司正与顾问合作，为其旗舰迷幻药物候选产品探索多种方案。【原文：AtaiBeckley Inc. is working with advisers to explore options for its flagship psychedelic drug candidate, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 五角大楼在人工智能领域的人类中心论之争中启用前优步高管
item.description: 埃米尔·迈克尔，国防部负责研究与工程事务的副部长。【原文：Emil Michael, under secretary of defense for research and engineering.】

item.title: 空客携手莱茵金属、OHB公司开发军用卫星
item.description: 据知情人士透露，空客防务与航天公司正考虑与德国防务巨头莱茵金属集团及本土卫星制造商OHB公司联合竞标，为德国联邦国防军打造类似Starlink的卫星互联网服务。【原文：Airbus Defence and Space is mulling a joint bid with German defense giant Rheinmetall AG and domestic satellite manufacturer OHB SE to build a Starlink-like internet service for the Bundeswehr armed forces, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 第二艘自称中国籍的散货船通过霍尔木兹海峡
item.description: 另一艘散货船在穿越霍尔木兹海峡时亮起中国船旗。这条位于波斯湾入口处的狭窄水道因该地区多次遭遇袭击，已实质性关闭一周。【原文：Another bulk carrier signaled it was Chinese-owned as it sailed through the Strait of Hormuz, the narrow waterway at the mouth of the Persian Gulf that’s been effectively closed for a week due to multiple attacks in the area.】

item.title: 稳定币公司押注人工智能代理支付，而该领域几乎尚不存在
item.description: Circle Internet Group Inc.与Stripe Inc.正竞相为一个尚未存在的世界构建支付系统——在这个世界里，自主人工智能代理每天进行数百万次交易，使用稳定币结算而非刷信用卡。【原文：Circle Internet Group Inc. and Stripe Inc. are racing to build payments systems for a world that doesn’t exist yet — one where autonomous AI agents transact millions of times a day, settling in stablecoins instead of swiping credit cards.】

item.title: 科威特因霍尔木兹海峡运输放缓削减原油及炼油产量
item.description: 科威特作为欧佩克第五大产油国，表示因霍尔木兹海峡航运放缓，已削减原油及炼油产量。【原文：Kuwait, OPEC’s fifth-biggest producer, said it has reduced oil and refinery production following the slowdown of shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 劳埃德·布兰克费恩在"焦虑的市场"中看到地缘政治风险
item.description: 这位前高盛首席执行官表示，他的经验提醒他，"清算"终将到来。【原文：The former Goldman Sachs CEO says his experience warns him that “a reckoning” is coming at some point.】

item.title: 贝莱德零售私募信贷计划遭遇市场恐慌
item.description: 当贝莱德公司豪掷120亿美元收购HPS投资伙伴公司，并大肆宣扬将向数百万散户投资者兜售复杂债务产品以获取丰厚回报的前景时，私募信贷市场似乎迎来了黄金时代。【原文：It looked like a golden age of private credit when BlackRock Inc. plunked down $12 billion to buy HPS Investment Partners and crowed about the prospect of selling millions of retail investors on juicy returns from complex debt.】

item.title: 特朗普的非洲矿产计划面临漫长征途，以期与主导地位的中国抗衡
item.description: 当华盛顿试图达成更大交易时，北京仍遥遥领先。【原文：While Washington is trying to make bigger deals, Beijing remains far ahead.】

item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡追踪：伊朗关联船只持续通行，其他船只避而远之
item.description: 霍尔木兹海峡的航运已连续第六天处于近乎停滞状态，过去24小时内仅有与伊朗有关联的油轮成功穿越该海峡。【原文：Strait of Hormuz transit remains near a standstill for a sixth day, with Iran-linked tankers the only large vessels making the crossing in the past 24 hours.】

item.title: 中东战争加剧，全球经济面临日益加剧的压力
item.description: 中东战争的经济影响正在向该地区以外蔓延。【原文：The economic fallout from the war in the Mideast is spreading outside the region.】

item.title: 全球经济图景：伊朗战争推高油价突破90美元大关
item.description: 美国油价创下有记录以来最大单周涨幅，伊朗战争颠覆了关键能源市场流动，霍尔木兹海峡的航运几乎完全停滞。【原文：US oil prices posted the biggest weekly gain on record as the war in Iran upends critical energy market flows, with shipping through the Strait of Hormuz grinding to a virtual halt.】

item.title: 亨利·布洛杰特谈软件抛售恐慌及其对OpenAI的挑战
item.description:
人工智能将如何影响媒体与软件行业。

【原文：

How AI will affect both media and software.

】

item.title: 零散股：亨利·布洛杰特谈OpenAI面临的困境（播客）
item.description: 一年前，所有讨论都围绕着大型人工智能公司被严重高估展开。人人都称其为泡沫。 时至今日，市场主流观点却认为人工智能威力如此强大，各类传统行业——尤其是软件领域——都可能走向消亡。真相究竟何在？人工智能估值又将何去何从？本期节目于2月25日在布鲁克林On Air播客节现场录制，我们再度邀请到前华尔街分析师亨利·布洛杰特展开探讨。【原文：A year ago, all of the talk was about how the big AI companies were wildly overvalued. Everyone was calling it a bubble. Fast forward to now, and a dominant idea in the markets is that AI is so powerful that all kinds of legacy businesses — particularly software — could go to zero. So where does the truth lie? And what now for AI valuations? On this episode, recorded live at the On Air podcast festival in Brooklyn on February 25, we catch up again with Henry Blodget, the former Wall Street analy】

item.title: 伊朗战争引发的能源价格冲击暴露欧洲脆弱性
item.description: 上个月，在安特卫普证券交易所的玻璃与锻铁穹顶之下，法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙向满座的重工业高管们发表演说。他直奔主题，切入众人最关切的问题：欧洲居高不下的能源价格。【原文：Underneath the glass and wrought iron ceiling of Antwerp’s stock exchange last month, French President Emmanuel Macron addressed a hall full of executives from heavy industries. He wasted no time in diving into the issue everyone cared most about: Europe’s perennially high energy prices.】

item.title: 图表解读：伊朗冲突如何扰乱全球贸易
item.description:
霍尔木兹海峡及整个海湾地区的领空关闭已对全球经济产生连锁反应，推高了石油和化肥价格。【原文：

The closure of the Strait of Hormuz and airspace across the Gulf has rippled through the global economy, pushing up oil and fertilizer prices.

】

item.title: 欧洲央行加息押注考验官员们保持冷静的努力
item.description: 欧洲央行试图在战争和通胀问题上保持冷静的努力正面临考验，因为市场已将今年加息的预期纳入定价。【原文：European Central Bank efforts to project calm over war and inflation are being tested as markets price in a hike in interest rates this year.】

item.title: 网易将停止对名越工作室的资金支持，因其正缩减游戏业务
item.description: 网易公司将停止对由《如龙》系列创作者名越稔洋领导的工作室的资金支持，这是该公司收缩游戏开发业务的整体战略中最新受影响的部门。【原文：NetEase Inc. will cut off funding to the studio led by Yakuza franchise creator Toshihiro Nagoshi, the latest to be affected by the Chinese company’s broader strategy to shrink game development activities.】

item.title: 沙特阿拉伯拦截飞向沙伊巴油田的无人机
item.description: 据沙特官方通讯社SPA报道，沙特阿拉伯在空旷沙漠地区拦截了数架无人机，这些无人机正朝沙伊巴油田方向飞去。该油田日均原油产量可达100万桶。【原文：Saudi Arabia intercepted drones in the Empty Quarter desert that were heading toward the Shaybah oil field, which has the capacity to produce 1 million barrels of crude a day, according to state-run SPA.】

item.title: 迪拜阿联酋航空因导弹威胁再度停飞
item.description: 迪拜的阿联酋航空周六再次暂停航班，此前又一轮拦截行动进一步扰乱了这家全球最大航空公司的运营。【原文：Dubai’s Emirates suspended flights again on Saturday after another round of interceptions further disrupted operations at the world’s largest airline.】

item.title: 印度上调液化石油气价格，霍尔木兹海峡危机导致供应受阻
item.description: 印度一年来首次上调最常用烹饪燃气价格，因伊朗战争扰乱中东能源供应，推高全球燃料成本。【原文：India raised prices of its most widely used cooking gas for the first time in a year, as the Iran war disrupted Middle East energy flows and sent global fuel costs higher.】

item.title: 中国敦促高危人群接受癌症筛查
item.description: 中国卫生部呼吁潜在风险人群接受癌症筛查，这是该国为加强癌症防治工作所采取的更广泛举措之一。【原文：China’s health ministry urged people at potential risk to undergo cancer screenings as part of a broader push to improve prevention and control of the disease.】

item.title: 中国转向人工智能领域，求职者数量已超过比利时总人口
item.description: 中国将利用人工智能创造就业岗位，因为今年即将进入劳动力市场的大学毕业生人数将达到1270万——超过比利时等国的人口总数。【原文：China will harness artificial intelligence to create jobs as the number of university graduates poised to enter the labor market this year will reach 12.7 million — more than the population of countries such as Belgium.】

item.title: 任天堂提起诉讼，要求就特朗普关税获得退款
item.description: 任天堂公司周五向美国国际贸易法院提起诉讼，要求退还因特朗普总统加征关税而向美国政府缴纳的关税。【原文：Nintendo Co. filed a lawsuit in the US Court of International Trade on Friday, seeking a refund for duties it paid to the US government as a result of President Donald Trump’s Tariffs.】

item.title: 中国央行扩大黄金购买规模，中东局势持续紧张
item.description: 中国央行2月份继续增持黄金，将连续购金周期延长至16个月。随着中东局势紧张升级，金价持续攀升。【原文：China’s central bank bought more gold in February, extending its streak of purchasing to 16 months, as bullion climbs amid escalating Middle East tensions.】
